# Ift Tests

**Summary**: Measurement of the force per unit length at the interface between two immiscible fluids.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2014-jangda|Jangda, 2014]] performed IFT tests to confirm the reduction in interfacial tension and stability of fluoro-surfactants.

## Instruments and Software



## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- Significant reduction in IFT was observed even at a low concentration (0.15%) of fluoro-surfactant. ([[2014-jangda|Jangda, 2014, p. 94]])
